zh.lifeSummary: 當Lensmand Otto Limbek於大約1279年出生在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 雷斯包格時，他的父親Henrik Limbek51歲，母親n.n.51歲。他於大約1300年與n.n.結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1313年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lensmand Otto Limbek于大约1279年出生在德国史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 雷斯包格时，他的父亲Henrik Limbek51岁，母亲n.n.51岁。他于大约1300年与n.n.结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1313年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Limbek
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Great Limber in Lindsey (Lincolnshire). This place is named with Old English lind ‘lime tree’ + beorg ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

en.lifeSummary: When Lensmand Otto Limbek was born about 1279, in Rendsburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany, his father, Henrik Limbek, was 51 and his mother, n.n., was 51. He married n.n. about 1300. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died after 1313.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lensmand Otto Limbek est né environ 1279, à Kreis Rendsburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne, son père, Henrik Limbek, avait 51 ans et sa mère, n.n., avait 51 ans. Il a épousé n.n. environ 1300. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé après 1313.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lensmand Otto Limbek um 1279 in Kreis Rendsburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henrik Limbek 51 und seine Mutter n.n. 51. Er hat um 1300 n.n. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb nach 1313.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lensmand Otto Limbek è nato il circa 1279 nel Kreis Rendsburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Germania, il suo padre, Henrik Limbek, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, n.n., aveva 51 anni. Lui sposato n.n. circa 1300. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì dopo il 1313.

ja.lifeSummary: Lensmand Otto Limbekが約1279年にドイツスチレスウィグ-hオルステインクレイス レンドスブルグで生まれた時，父Henrik Limbekは51歳，母n.n.は51歳であった。約1300年にn.n.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1313年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lensmand Otto Limbek(이)가 대략 1279년 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 렌드스버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henrik Limbek(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 n.n.(은)는 51세였다. 그는 대략 1300년 n.n.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1313년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lensmand Otto Limbek nasceu aproximadamente 1279, em Kreis Rendsburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha, seu pai, Henrik Limbek, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, n.n., tinha 51 anos. Ele casou-se com n.n. aproximadamente 1300. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1313.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lensmand Otto Limbek родился около 1279 г. в местности крис рендсбург, щлесвиг-холстин, Германия, его отцу по имени Henrik Limbek было 51 год, а матери, которую звали n.n., 51. Он женился на женщине по имени n.n. около 1300 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер после 1313 г.

sm.about 1279–after 1313: e tusa o le 1279–ina ua ma'ea le 1313

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lensmand Otto Limbek nació aproximadamente 1279, en Kreis Rendsburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemania, su papá, Henrik Limbek, tenía 51 años y su mamá, n.n., tenía 51 años. Se casó con n.n. aproximadamente 1300. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió después de 1313.
